refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization results against the target energy_per_ton metric.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms for energy management.
DP3: Use data analytics and feedback loops for operational optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Deploy integrated energy and load sensors with telemetry reporting.

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between measurement and control modules
Feedback loops between optimization and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is foundational and logically decoupled enough to be implemented independently before control and optimization.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data can be obtained and transmitted reliably.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy measurement accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating control and optimization DP selections in subsequent decomposition levels.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including energy and load sensors, and onboard telemetry systems.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Transmit energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution for analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Support bidirectional communication for sensor data and control commands.

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to centralized data processing; low containment of physical sensors.
Sensors and telemetry physically contained within Vehicle; minimal diffusion.
Not relevant for sensor hardware containment.
No containment of energy measurement functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure physical proximity to sensors.
containment_risks: Potential integration complexity with NGHE Solution for data aggregation.
Vehicle module ownership must ensure sensor calibration and maintenance.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions to ensure telemetry data security and integrity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-function of measuring energy consumption with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry data diffusion to NGHE Solution may introduce latency or data loss risks.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Physical sensor containment within Vehicle module is appropriate and minimizes diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor calibration tests and telemetry data validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for sensor maintenance responsibilities within Vehicle ownership.

decision.justification: The current decomposition level successfully refines the FR and selects a DP with appropriate IM assignment, but further decomposition is needed for control and optimization sub-FRs.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: To further decompose and address control and optimization functions for energy efficiency.

assumptions: Vehicle module can support telemetry hardware and software.
open_risks: Sensor failure impact on energy measurement.
Data latency or loss in telemetry transmission.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and accuracy test results.
